query:
SELECT emailStatus, infoPackStatus, COUNT(*) as count FROM studio_mailing_list GROUP BY emailStatus, infoPackStatus ORDER BY emailStatus, infoPackStatus;
SELECT COUNT(*) as sendable FROM studio_mailing_list WHERE emailStatus = 'found' AND infoPackStatus = 'not_sent' AND email IS NOT NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 25vRfUBwvHKUCo5.root --database Pa7E4RBX4UbpFBvKpz2nxk --execute SELECT emailStatus, infoPackStatus, COUNT(*) as count FROM studio_mailing_list GROUP BY emailStatus, infoPackStatus ORDER BY emailStatus, infoPackStatus;
SELECT COUNT(*) as sendable FROM studio_mailing_list WHERE emailStatus = 'found' AND infoPackStatus = 'not_sent' AND email IS NOT NULL;
